exercises.title: Which Branch?
exercises.content: For each scenario, which branch of physics explains it? Put them in the right group.

exercises.title: Identify the Right Branch
exercises.content: Your car engine gets hot as it runs. Which branch of physics explains why?
exercises.explanation: Thermodynamics deals with heat and temperature. A hot engine is a thermodynamics question.

exercises.title: Categorize Your Day
exercises.content: Think about today. List 2 things that classical mechanics explains and 2 things that a different branch explains.
hints: Classical: anything moving or changing direction

exercises.title: Why Divide Physics?
exercises.content: Why do you think physicists divided physics into branches instead of keeping it all as one subject?
hints: Think about how hard it would be to learn everything at once
Each branch has different tools and rules
Is it easier to be an expert in one area or know a little about everything?
